final_response:
Here are the relevant sudo access entries from the /etc/sudoers file:

## Users with Sudo Access:

1. **root** (line 6)
   - `root    ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL`
   - Full sudo access - can run any command as any user

2. **%admin group** (line 7)
   - `%admin ALL=(ALL) ALL`
   - All members of the 'admin' group have full sudo access

3. **%sudo group** (line 8)
   - `%sudo   ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL`
   - All members of the 'sudo' group have full sudo access

4. **cicd-user** (line 9)
   - `cicd-user ALL=(ALL)
